meta_title: For Freelancers: passive income to Solve no SaaS knowledge (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to passive income and overcome no SaaS knowledge. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Passive Income for Freelancers: Build SaaS Without Coding
content.seo_description: Stop trading time for money. Learn how to build passive income SaaS products using Antigravity and Claude Code, even with zero traditional coding knowledge.
content.answer_block: You don't need a CS degree to build SaaS. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid architecture and Claude Code for iterative development, you can automate product creation. This stack allows freelancers to transform manual client workflows into scalable, passive income assets without writing raw boilerplate code from scratch.
content.intro:
The client-work treadmill is relentless. You spend your days chasing invoices and fixing bugs for others, while your own potential for equity and passive wealth remains locked behind the 'I don't know how to code SaaS' barrier. It is a modern tragedy of the freelance economy: you have the domain expertise, but lack the technical bridge.

But the game has changed. With the emergence of AI-native tooling, the barrier to entry has evaporated. You are no longer a coder; you are an architect. By combining the rapid scaffolding of Antigravity with the autonomous execution of Claude Code, you can now ship functional, revenue-generating software in days, not months.

steps.title: Define the Value Prop
steps.description: Identify a repetitive manual task you perform for clients and draft a core feature set that solves it.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a lean technical specification for a SaaS tool that automates [insert manual task]. Include user authentication, a dashboard, and a Stripe checkout integration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --init 'Generate a project roadmap for a SaaS that solves [insert problem]'

steps.title: Bootstrap the Architecture
steps.description: Generate the foundation of your app. Antigravity handles the folder structure and dependency management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a full-stack Next.js scaffold with Supabase integration, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'Set up the project environment and install all dependencies defined in the Antigravity spec'

steps.title: Build the Core Logic
steps.description: Translate your domain expertise into business logic. Focus on the 'magic' feature that provides the most value.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a server-side function that processes user input, interacts with the OpenAI API, and returns a formatted report.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --edit 'Implement the core logic in /lib/logic.ts to process user data and return the structured response'

steps.title: Implement Payment Gateways
steps.description: Integrate Stripe to ensure your SaaS is ready to accept passive income.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure a Stripe Webhook and a checkout session creation function for a monthly subscription model.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'Connect Stripe API keys and implement the subscription checkout flow'

steps.title: Automated Testing & Deployment
steps.description: Ensure stability and push to production so you can start marketing your tool.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of Playwright tests for the user authentication flow and the primary subscription checkout path.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --run 'Run tests and deploy to Vercel'

pro_tips: Focus on 'micro-SaaS'—build one specific tool for one specific niche to minimize support overhead.
Use Claude Code to write your unit tests first; it forces the AI to understand the business logic before writing the implementation.
Keep your database schema minimal; use JSONB columns in Supabase to remain flexible during the initial growth phase.
Always automate your onboarding email sequence using Resend or Postmark at the moment of signup to increase retention.
Monitor your logs via Vercel or Supabase to identify where users drop off, then ask Claude Code to refactor those specific components.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, focus on building a landing page using your own tool as the primary lead magnet. Iterate based on actual user feedback rather than your assumptions.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for others and start building your own future. With these tools, you are weeks away from your first dollar of recurring revenue. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
